commit.message: [FLINK-29496][Connector/Kinesis] Add configuration option for setting STS endpoint for AWS connectors

files.patch:
@@ -240,6 +240,14 @@ Connector Options String The external ID to use when credential provider type is set to ASSUME_ROLE. + +
aws.credentials.role.stsEndpoint
+ optional + no + (none) + String + The AWS endpoint for STS (derived from the AWS region setting if not set) to use when credential provider type is set to ASSUME_ROLE. +

optional
